programme.title: Song Dynasty Poetry: Beauty Across Time Ep.2
programme.desc: Through the lens of Song dynasty poetry, this documentary brings to life the era's great poets, their works, and the stories behind them. By delving into their values and worldview, it reveals the deeper spirit within the culture, resulting in a work that is at once thoughtful, artistic, and deeply human.

programme.title: Song Dynasty Poetry: Beauty Across Time Ep.3
programme.desc: Through the lens of Song dynasty poetry, this documentary brings to life the era's great poets, their works, and the stories behind them. By delving into their values and worldview, it reveals the deeper spirit within the culture, resulting in a work that is at once thoughtful, artistic, and deeply human.

programme.title: Song Dynasty Poetry: Beauty Across Time Ep.4
programme.desc: Through the lens of Song dynasty poetry, this documentary brings to life the era's great poets, their works, and the stories behind them. By delving into their values and worldview, it reveals the deeper spirit within the culture, resulting in a work that is at once thoughtful, artistic, and deeply human.

programme.title: Roots of the Nation Ep.2
programme.desc: Explores agricultural modernization and innovation in China, uncovering the forces behind these transformative changes and answering the century-old question: \"Who will feed China in the 21st century?\.

programme.title: Roots of the Nation Ep.2
programme.desc: Explores agricultural modernization and innovation in China, uncovering the forces behind these transformative changes and answering the century-old question: \"Who will feed China in the 21st century?\.

programme.title: Roots of the Nation Ep.3
programme.desc: Explores agricultural modernization and innovation in China, uncovering the forces behind these transformative changes and answering the century-old question: \"Who will feed China in the 21st century?\.

programme.title: Roots of the Nation Ep.3
programme.desc: Explores agricultural modernization and innovation in China, uncovering the forces behind these transformative changes and answering the century-old question: \"Who will feed China in the 21st century?\.

programme.title: Flowers of Yunnan Ep.2
programme.desc: A panoramic view of Yunnan's flower industry and its vibrant culture, woven through four thematic threads. From mountains to rainforests, this documentary showcases the region's floral resources while shedding light on each species and the technological innovation driving the industry.

programme.title: Flowers of Yunnan Ep.3
programme.desc: A panoramic view of Yunnan's flower industry and its vibrant culture, woven through four thematic threads. From mountains to rainforests, this documentary showcases the region's floral resources while shedding light on each species and the technological innovation driving the industry.

programme.title: Flowers of Yunnan Ep.4
programme.desc: A panoramic view of Yunnan's flower industry and its vibrant culture, woven through four thematic threads. From mountains to rainforests, this documentary showcases the region's floral resources while shedding light on each species and the technological innovation driving the industry.

programme.title: China Untapped: Xizang Ep.1
programme.desc: Follow traveling host He Tianran as he explores Xizang's many cultural treasures. Take in the majesty of the Potala Palace, discover intangible cultural heritage skills such as Tibetan paper making and Tibetan incense, and experience the plateau's natural wonders in a whole new light.

programme.title: Song Dynasty Poetry: Beauty Across Time Ep.1
programme.desc: Through the lens of Song dynasty poetry, this documentary brings to life the era's great poets, their works, and the stories behind them. By delving into their values and worldview, it reveals the deeper spirit within the culture, resulting in a work that is at once thoughtful, artistic, and deeply human.

programme.title: Resurrection of Ancient Books Ep.1
programme.desc: Meet a group of \"doctors\" who specialize in ancient book restoration. Watch their heroic rescue efforts as they repair these national treasures with surgical precision, preserving their precious histories for all time.

programme.title: Roots of the Nation Ep.6
programme.desc: Explores agricultural modernization and innovation in China, uncovering the forces behind these transformative changes and answering the century-old question: \"Who will feed China in the 21st century?\.

programme.title: The Fish-shaped Lanterns That Have Been
programme.desc: Meet Pan Min, a content creator documenting fish lantern culture who also designs study tours to boost village tourism. Alongside inheritor Wang Fengcheng, they're finding creative ways to keep the traditional craft afloat, opening a new chapter in fish lantern culture.

programme.title: Yingge Dance: A Celebration of Heroes
programme.desc: The Yingge Dance always brings a festive energy to the Lunar New Year in southern China’s Chaoshan area, capturing the nation's attention in the process. With every strike of their mallets, a deep sense of nostalgia and cultural pride reverberates through China's youth. This episode follows animator Zhu Xiaopeng as he trains with inheritor He Murong, using modern technology to keep the spirit of Yingge alive.

programme.title: The Lush Green Gannan Ep.1
programme.desc: This documentary captures the remarkable transformation of Gannan over the past decade, a region that serves as a critical water source and recharge zone for the upper reaches of the Yellow and Yangtze rivers, a national ecological functional area, and a pilot zone for ecological civilization.

programme.title: The Lush Green Gannan Ep.1
programme.desc: This documentary captures the remarkable transformation of Gannan over the past decade, a region that serves as a critical water source and recharge zone for the upper reaches of the Yellow and Yangtze rivers, a national ecological functional area, and a pilot zone for ecological civilization.

programme.desc: This documentary captures the remarkable transformation of Gannan over the past decade, a region that serves as a critical water source and recharge zone for the upper reaches of the Yellow and Yangtze rivers, a national ecological functional area, and a pilot zone for ecological civilization.

programme.title: Made in China: The Story Behind the Label Ep.1
programme.desc: ‘Made in China: The Story Behind the Label’ profiles four county-level economies driving industrial innovation and emerging sectors across China.

programme.desc: Explores agricultural modernization and innovation in China, uncovering the forces behind these transformative changes and answering the century-old question: \"Who will feed China in the 21st century?\.

programme.desc: The Yingge Dance always brings a festive energy to the Lunar New Year in southern China’s Chaoshan area, capturing the nation's attention in the process. With every strike of their mallets, a deep sense of nostalgia and cultural pride reverberates through China's youth. This episode follows animator Zhu Xiaopeng as he trains with inheritor He Murong, using modern technology to keep the spirit of Yingge alive.
